metadata.description: Visual identity tokens for Codebolt. Colors, typography, spacing, and design principles. The visual system should feel: engineered, precise, high-performance, warm but not casual.

design_philosophy: The visual system mirrors the product philosophy: precision-engineered, nothing decorative, everything intentional. Like an F1 car — functional beauty that comes from optimizing every element for performance.

bolt_blue.usage: Primary actions, key UI elements, brand mark

bolt_dark.usage: Backgrounds, deep surfaces, primary text on light

signal_green.usage: Success states, agent coordination indicators, positive metrics

alert_amber.usage: Warnings, drift detection indicators, attention states

guidelines.note: Dark mode is primary. The product is an IDE — dark backgrounds are expected and reduce eye strain. Light mode is available but secondary.

monospace.name: JetBrains Mono
monospace.usage: Code, technical content, data displays, terminal

typography.guidelines: Typography should feel precise and engineered. No decorative fonts. No script fonts. Tight tracking on headlines, comfortable reading on body. Monospace for anything technical.

spacing.note: Use consistent spacing multiples. Generous whitespace signals confidence and precision.

visual_principles: Generous whitespace — confidence comes from what you leave out
Dark mode primary — this is an engineering tool
Subtle motion — purposeful transitions, never decorative animation
Technical precision in every visual element
